criteria.method: YouTube internal API /youtubei/v1/search, ~80 queries, channels filter (EgIQAg==), 800+ channels scanned. LATAM filter: linguistic markers (vos/acá/aguante/boludeo/che/wacho/concha/brasileros), city/country references, email TLD .ar/.uy

excluded_notable.reason: Variety gaming (Resident Evil, CoD, CS2 occasional) — not CS2 focused; collaborates with Spain creators
Argentine variety reactions (second channel), no CS2
Chilean clips compilation channel, not primary creator
Likely Spain — skin trading content style
Argentine CS2 compilation/org, not individual creator

notes: LATAM CS2 YouTube scene is dominated by Argentina (11/13) and Uruguay (2/13). No significant Mexican, Colombian, Chilean or other LATAM country individual CS2 creators found at 2k-500k scale despite 30+ country-specific queries. Spain creators dominate the higher follower ranges.
